lingala.correct_the_exact_answer_and_estimate_: Malamu. Eyano ya sikisiki na estimation eyokani.

lingala.not_yet_compare_your_answer_with_your_: Naino te. Kokanisa eyano na yo na estimation na yo mpe meka mayele moko.
lingala.that_is_not_the_key_error_read_the_wor: Yango ezali libunga ya monene te. Tanga mosala yango place value moko na moko.
lingala.correct_the_operation_and_context_answ: Malamu. Operation mpe eyano na kati ya likambo, nyonso mibale eyokani na lisolo.
lingala.reconsider_which_operation_represents_: Kanisa lisusu operation nini emonisi boyokani oyo ezali na lisolo.
lingala.the_operation_fits_recheck_how_the_con: Operation ebongi. Tala lisusu ndenge likambo ebongoli eyano ya motango.

lingala.place_value_alignment_for: Kotia molongo na place value mpo na

lingala.one_factor_is_0_so_there_are_no_equal_: Factor moko ezali 0, yango wana ezali na bituluku ya kokokana te ya kosala. Product: 0.

lingala.this_whole_number_workspace_keeps_the_: Esika oyo ya mosala ya whole number ekopekisa motango ya mibale koleka oyo ya liboso. Soki mokano ya koyekola ezali eyano ya négatif, salela integer number line.
lingala.reasonableness_check_use_friendly_oper: Kotala soki ebongi: salela mitango oyo ezali pete mpo na kotanga
lingala.estimation_is_a_safety_check_not_a_rep: Estimation ezali botali ya bokengi, ezali esika ya makanisi ya sikisiki te.
lingala.correct_your_exact_answer_and_estimate: Malamu. Eyano na yo ya sikisiki na estimation na yo esungani.
lingala.your_exact_answer_is_right_revise_the_: Eyano na yo ya sikisiki ezali malamu. Bongisa estimation mpo ekɔta na ndelo oyo ebongi pene na
lingala.not_yet_recheck_each_place_and_compare: Naino te. Tala lisusu place value moko na moko mpe kokanisa yango na estimation na yo.
lingala.diagnose_the_reasoning_not_the_learner: Sosola makanisi, moyekoli te. Mabunga ezali elembo ya model nini ekosalisa na sima.
lingala.look_again_at_what_happened_to_each_pl: Tala lisusu nini esalemaki na place value moko na moko to na partial product moko na moko.
lingala.that_operation_does_not_represent_the_: Operation wana emonisi naino boyokani te. Mituna yo moko soki lisolo ezali kosangisa, kokabola, kozongela bituluku ya kokokana, to koluka bituluku boni ekokota.
lingala.the_whole_number_answer_is_right_re_re: Eyano ya whole number ezali malamu. Tanga lisusu nini lisolo esengi osala na motuya oyo etikali.
lingala.the_operation_fits_recheck_the_calcula: Operation ebongi. Tala lisusu motango mpe zwa mokano soki likambo esaleli quotient, oyo etikali, to etuluku moko ya kobakisa.
lingala.choose_the_operation_from_the_story_th: Pona operation na lisolo, na sima limbola eyano na kati ya likambo.

lingala.n_3_relationship_are_quantities_joined_s: 3. Boyokani: bamotuya ezali kosangisama, kokabolama, kozongelama na bituluku ya kokokana, to kosangisama na monene?
lingala.n_5_context_check_decide_what_the_story_: 5. Botali ya likambo: zwa mokano ya nini elakisi mpo na lisolo ntango motuya etikali.

lingala.build_meaning_first_compare_strategies: Tonga ndimbola liboso, kokanisa mayele, mpe salela estimation mpo na kotala eyano nyonso.
lingala.a_correct_answer_matters_but_a_model_e: Eyano ya malamu ezali na ntina, kasi model, ndimbola, estimation, mpe botali na inverse operation nde esalaka ete makanisi eumela.
